negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: industry_054
prompt: A dimly lit blacksmithing workshop serves as the backdrop for a forging process. A glowing red-hot metal bar lies on an anvil beneath a powerful forging press. The press's ram, positioned above the bar, descends repeatedly, striking the metal with each impact. Sparks fly from the contact point, highlighting the intense heat and force applied during the forging process. The metal bar gradually bends under the repeated blows, transforming its shape. The background reveals several large gas cylinders, indicating their role in heating the metal. The overall atmosphere is one of focused craftsmanship, with the glowing metal contrasting sharply against the dark, industrial setting. A close-up shot captures the dynamic interaction between the hot metal and the forging press.
